string: Workout uses your camera to scan barcodes for food entries and to take progress photos.
Workout lets you upload progress photos from your photo library.
Workout can save your progress photos to your photo library.
Workout uses your microphone for voice conversations with the AI assistant.
Workout transcribes your speech to text so you can talk to the AI assistant hands-free.
Workout connects to compatible Bluetooth body scales to read your weight automatically.
